111:     private val domains = mutableSetOf<String>()

116:     override suspend fun containsSender(sender: String) = sender in senders
117:     override suspend fun containsDomain(domain: String) = domain in domains

31:

26:         val json = VerdictParser.extractJson(text)

28:     }
